hooks.command: file=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | grep -o '"file_path":"[^"]*"' | grep 'backend/src/.*\.ts' | head -1); [ -n "$file" ] && cd /Users/m2pro/Documents/claudecode/practica/backend && npm run lint -- --quiet 2>&1 | tail -5 || true

echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -e '.tool_input.file_path | contains("docs/features/")' >/dev/null 2>&1 && echo '{"systemMessage":"✅ Feature doc created!

📋 Feature Completion Checklist:
  [ ] Backend endpoints implemented
  [ ] DTOs with validation
  [ ] Tests (unit + E2E)
  [ ] Frontend pages/components
  [ ] Pinia store
  [ ] API integration tested
  [ ] Documentation (docs/features/[name].md)
  [ ] ADR created (if decision needed)
  [ ] Code review
  [ ] Ready to merge!

See docs/features/TEMPLATE.md for the template."}' || true
echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | grep -q '\.env"' && echo 'ERROR: Blocked edit to .env — modify .env.example instead, never .env directly.' && exit 2 || exit 0
